summary: Privacy Settings, Follow Requests, and DM Gating feature testing complete. All backend APIs tested and working. Frontend Settings page verified with Privacy & Messaging UI. One bug fix applied: _build_user_response was missing is_private and dm_setting fields in response.
test_credentials: Dynamic test users created and deleted during tests
seed_data_creation: Test users created via API during testing (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Privacy feature fully tested and working. Backend: PUT /api/auth/me accepts is_private and dm_setting. GET /api/users/{username} returns privacy fields (is_private, dm_setting, is_approved_follower, follow_request_status, profile_locked, mutual signals). POST /api/follow/{username} creates follow_request for private users. Follow request CRUD endpoints work. Profile content endpoints (records/spins/posts) return 403 for private profiles when not a follower. DM gating: dm_setting='following' returns 403 if recipient doesn't follow sender, dm_setting='requests' creates pending conversation. Accept/decline endpoints for follow requests and message requests work. Frontend: Settings page has Privacy & Messaging card with private toggle (data-testid='private-account-toggle') and DM options (data-testid='dm-setting-everyone/following/requests'). ProfilePage handles locked profiles, follow request states, and FollowRequestsBadge/Modal. MessagesPage has inbox/requests tabs with accept/decline UI.

frontend: Settings page loads with Privacy & Messaging card

bug_fixed.issue: Missing is_private and dm_setting fields in UserResponse
bug_fixed.fix: Added is_private=user.get('is_private', False) and dm_setting=user.get('dm_setting', 'everyone') to the return statement

backend_endpoints.PUT /api/auth/me: Accepts is_private and dm_setting fields, updates user, returns updated UserResponse with privacy fields
backend_endpoints.GET /api/users/{username}: Returns is_private, dm_setting, is_approved_follower, follow_request_status, profile_locked, and mutual signals (records_in_common, mutual_followers) for locked profiles
backend_endpoints.POST /api/follow/{username}: Returns {status: 'requested'} for private users, {status: 'following'} for public users
backend_endpoints.GET /api/follow-requests: Returns pending follow requests for current user with from_user details
backend_endpoints.POST /api/follow-requests/{id}/accept: Creates follower relationship, updates status to accepted

profile_access_gating: GET /api/users/{username}/records - returns 403 for private profile when not follower
GET /api/users/{username}/spins - returns 403 for private profile when not follower
GET /api/users/{username}/posts - returns 403 for private profile when not follower

dm_gating.dm_setting='following': Returns 403 if recipient doesn't follow sender
dm_gating.dm_setting='requests': Creates conversation with status='pending', sender waits for accept/decline

frontend_components.SettingsPage: Privacy & Messaging card with private toggle and DM options
frontend_components.ProfilePage: Locked profile view, follow request state, FollowRequestsBadge
frontend_components.MessagesPage: Inbox/Requests tabs with accept/decline in thread
